div.head: The Ambassador in Chile (Sevier) to the Acting Secretary of State
div.p: 2. Department’s telegram No. 8, January 6, 4 p.m.Not printed. Copy of nitrate bill as finally approved by Congress was forwarded by air mail January 6th.For text of law No. 5350, see Diario Oficial No. 16,767, January 8, 1934. Representative of American interests says the plan appears to be a workable foundation but it is not certain how it will work out in reorganization of the capital structure with relation to the various classes of bondholders. He adds that he is recommending that no assistance through diplomatic channels be requested at present. Repeat to Department of Commerce.
